name: Low Carb Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Coat muffin cups with a little vegetable oil (or use butter, margarine, or pan spray).
2. Separate the eggs very carefully, allowing no egg yolk to mix with the whites.
3. Beat the egg whites with an electric mixer until frothy. Add the cream of tartar and continue beating just until stiff peaks form.
4. Combine egg yolks, cottage cheese, soy flour, and sweetener. Fold this mixture carefully into the beaten egg whites.
5. Fill each muffin cup 2/3 full with batter. Bake the muffins for about 30 minutes, until golden brown and spring back when touched.
Variation: To make spice muffins, stir 1/2 tsp cinnamon, 1/4 tsp ground ginger, and 1/8 tsp cloves into the soy flour before adding to the egg yolks.
